issues.detail: The instructions do not cover all possible error scenarios and edge cases, such as permission errors or missing logs.

scenarios.name: Diagnose 5-second cold start on a Node Lambda
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits the documented priority-order fixes (AWS SDK v2 to v3 modular imports, lazy-load heavy deps, raise memory to scale CPU, arm64); baseline gives generic advice without the specific causes-then-fixes framework.

scenarios.name: Trace a chained Lambda timeout across multiple functions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment produces the documented START/END timeline with root cause and platform fix (memorySize/provisionedConcurrency or async via SQS); baseline tells the user to check CloudWatch without correlating across invocations.
